title: Fix single stream item: dom_id on element
prompt:
Write lib/my_app_web/live/tasks_list_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.TasksListLive) that iterates @streams.tasks correctly. The element inside must set id={dom_id} from the {dom_id, task} tuple:
{task.title}
. mount/3 calls stream(socket, :tasks, []).
tier_rationale: Stream tuple destructuring is a mechanical idiom once you know it.
